HERO.TITLE: We Move Your Trade
HERO.TITLE_ACCENT: To Every Corner of the World
HERO.SUBTITLE: Import and export of all food and industrial products with complete safety

ABOUT.SUBTITLE: About Us
ABOUT.TITLE: Your Trusted Partner in
ABOUT.TEXT1: Imdad Import & Export is your trusted partner with over 20 years of experience. We rely on a strong global network and an approach based on transparency and fair trade.
ABOUT.TEXT2: We provide highly efficient import and export solutions that meet our clients' needs and help them succeed in global markets.

STATS.TITLE: Key Statistics of
STATS.DESC: We don't just make promises — we deliver tangible results that reflect our commitment to excellence in international trade.

SERVICES.TITLE: Comprehensive International
SERVICES.IMPORT_TEXT: A strong international network that provides the best products with high quality and competitive prices from countries around the world.
SERVICES.EXPORT_TEXT: We are committed to providing professional export services by selecting the best Egyptian factories and ensuring the highest quality at the best price.
SERVICES.PRODUCTS_TEXT: A wide range of Egyptian products (appliances, food, raw materials) in accordance with the highest international standards.

WHY.TITLE: Why Choose
WHY.Q1_TEXT: We offer high-quality Egyptian products that precisely meet the expectations and requirements of global markets.
WHY.Q2_TEXT: We provide products at competitive and well-studied prices, giving our clients a real advantage in both local and international markets.
WHY.Q3_TEXT: Precision and speed in delivering shipments according to the agreed schedule with no delays.
WHY.Q4_TEXT: We rely on experts with extensive and deep experience in international trade and logistics services.
WHY.Q5_TEXT: Preparation of shipping documents and provision of diverse shipping methods tailored to each client's needs.

ORDER.HERO_SUBTITLE: We are here to meet your business needs with full professionalism

PRODUCTS.TITLE: Guide to
PRODUCTS.DESC: Due to the strong presence of Imdad Import & Export in the Egyptian market, and with its high administrative, financial, and technical capabilities, we are able to provide all Egyptian products required for export to global markets, most notably:
PRODUCTS.FOOTER_NOTE: The team at Imdad Import & Export is ready and waiting for clients to simply place their order. We will immediately begin fulfilling requests for any of the listed products or others, with precision, quality, competitive pricing, and record-breaking turnaround — regardless of order size.

ABOUT_PAGE.HERO_SUBTITLE: Twenty years of expertise, trust renewed every day
ABOUT_PAGE.WHO_HEADING: Leading the World of International Trade
ABOUT_PAGE.WHO_TEXT1: Since its establishment in 2006, Imdad has proven itself as a trusted name in both the Egyptian and international markets. We don't start from scratch — we build on a successful professional track record and an ambitious vision aimed at delivering a world-class model in global trade.
ABOUT_PAGE.WHO_TEXT2: The company is distinguished by a strong international network, accumulated expertise, and in-depth knowledge of import and export markets — earning the trust of partners across many countries.
ABOUT_PAGE.VALUES_TEXT: We operate according to the principles of fair trade, with full commitment to transparency and cooperation to achieve mutual success — placing client satisfaction and providing the best products at the top of our priorities.
ABOUT_PAGE.GOAL_TEXT: To be the trusted partner that guarantees highly efficient services and facilitates the flow of trade between local and global markets with seamless professionalism.

IMPORT_PAGE.HERO_DESC: We connect you with top suppliers and handle everything until delivery
IMPORT_PAGE.WHY_1_DESC: Deep understanding of local market challenges to ensure the best results for your business.
IMPORT_PAGE.WHY_2_DESC: We protect you by verifying suppliers and ensuring product quality before shipping.
IMPORT_PAGE.WHY_3_DESC: Accurate and comprehensive cost analysis before starting to match your budget.
IMPORT_PAGE.CTA_DESC: Leave the details to us and focus on growing your business. Our team is ready to support you now.

SERVICES.S1_DESC: We find the best factories in China, Turkey, and beyond.
SERVICES.S2_DESC: We negotiate directly to secure the best possible price.
SERVICES.S3_DESC: Thorough product inspection before shipping to ensure compliance.
SERVICES.S4_DESC: Comprehensive sea and air freight solutions.
SERVICES.S5_DESC: Professional and fast customs clearance inside Egypt.
SERVICES.S6_DESC: Delivering your goods straight to your warehouse door.

STEPS.STEP1: Send us the product or idea
STEPS.STEP2: We provide quotes from verified suppliers
STEPS.STEP6: You receive your goods ready to go

FAQS.Q1: What is the minimum order quantity?
FAQS.A1: It varies by product type. We offer solutions starting from small quantities up to full containers.
FAQS.A2: It includes the product cost, shipping, customs, and management commission.
FAQS.A3: It depends on the shipping method (sea or air) and country of origin, typically ranging from 10 to 45 days.
FAQS.A4: Yes, we serve both companies and individuals looking to start their own business ventures.

EXPORT_PAGE.HERO_DESC: We help you export your products to global markets easily and safely from start to finish.
EXPORT_PAGE.WHY_1_DESC: We work with the best Egyptian factories to ensure a product you can be proud of globally.
EXPORT_PAGE.WHY_2_DESC: We guarantee all shipments meet international specifications and global quality standards.
EXPORT_PAGE.WHY_3_DESC: We provide the best shipping and logistics costs to maximize your profit margins.
EXPORT_PAGE.CTA_DESC: Start expanding your business and reaching global markets with professional export services.

SERVICES.S1_DESC: Providing high-quality Egyptian products from trusted suppliers and factories.
SERVICES.S2_DESC: Preparing invoices, packing lists, certificates of origin, and international standards.
SERVICES.S3_DESC: Professional packaging according to international standards to ensure product safety.
SERVICES.S4_DESC: Comprehensive international shipping solutions (sea & air) at the best prices.
SERVICES.S5_DESC: Completing all customs procedures to ensure fast and smooth shipment departure.
SERVICES.S6_DESC: Precise tracking of the shipment from departure until delivery to the end client.

STEPS.STEP1: Identifying the product and target market carefully.
STEPS.STEP2: Sourcing the right suppliers or factories for your order.
STEPS.STEP3: Preparing all required documents and legal paperwork.
STEPS.STEP4: Starting packaging operations according to specifications.
STEPS.STEP5: Executing the final shipment and completing customs clearance.
STEPS.STEP6: Delivering the shipment to the client at its final destination.
